GeneralDescription.SourceString: Tactician. Survivor. Starter of the party.
GeneralDescription.LocalizedString: Tactician. Survivor. Starter of the party.

AdditionalDescription.SourceString: The intense leader of The High Stakes Club is dressed up for an awesome concert, as Joni the Scarlet. She's always been a mega-fan of rockstar Countess Daraku, so how will she handle learning that her idol is secretly a villainous vampire?
